title: Staff: Rebecca Steiner
staff_title: Grant Administrator, Office of Research Administration
content:
Ms. Rebecca Steiner is the Grant Administrator, Office of Research Administration.

Office: Tyler Hall, Suite 304. Phone: 443-885-4044. Email: rebecca.steiner@morgan.edu.

Ms. Rebecca Steiner is a Grant Administrator in the Office of Research Administration.

Education: BA, Hampshire College.

Certifications: Certified Research Administrator (CRA) (Research Administrators Certification Council; Certified Financial Research Administrator (CFRA) (Research Administrators Certification Council; Certified Pre-Award Research Administrator (CPRA) (Research Administrators Certification Council.

Certificates: Research Administration (University of Maryland, Baltimore).
